item.title: Stride Security Act Slaps 50% Tariff on Canadian Walking Boots
item.description: New law mandates foot-strength quotas; officials suggest blisters are the new patriotic sacrifice.

item.title: Milking the System: Millbrook's Milk Tariff Sparks Hectic Haywire at the Town Line
item.description: As local farmers scramble to circumvent duties, Mayor Kline's border patrol plans come under fire for their dairy approach.

item.title: Bureaucratic Ox-travaganza: New Trade Accord Promises Long Delays and Oxen-Driven Economic Growth
item.description: Officials laud ox carts' 'relationship-building intervals' as a model of effective governance.

item.title: Lifelong Labor Bureau Declares 50% Tariff a 'Workforce Continuity Triumph' as On-Site Transitions Soar
item.description: 14,000 fatalities at fulfillment centers rebranded as 'permanent promotions' amidst supply chain collapse.

item.title: Humming Hurts: New Duty Turns Canadian Refrains into Domestic Fiasco
item.description: U.S. Aural Trade Authority's 50% duty on hummed melodies may strike the wrong chord with Midwest counties.

item.title: Great Documentation Collapse Sparks National Sketchpad Shortage
item.description: Charcoal tolls draw eye-rolling as bureaucratic delays stretch ID lines into eternity.

item.title: NSF Panel Uncovers Shocking Truth: Canadian Brine Tariffs Responsible for Refrigeration’s Never-Existing
item.description: Experts link brine shortages to spoiled potato salad and declining milk delivery satisfaction.

item.title: Local Apocalypse Amenities Rated: Bunker Wi-Fi Drops to 2.5 Stars Amid Nationwide Shortages
item.description: Maple syrup rationing hotline wait times listed as a leading complaint in consumer satisfaction surveys.

item.title: Commuters Schedule Afterlife Delays as Soulbound Express Names New Auditor of Ghostly Efficiency
item.description: Brennan Drizzle’s promotion rewards stalled souls with guaranteed ash-cloud transit credits.

item.title: HEROIC COLLECTIVE SUBMITS 312 NEW PICKET-FENCE ALIGNMENT SUBCOMMITTEES TO MEET CEASEFIRE QUOTA AFTER DIRECTORATE LOSS
item.description: Ninth Directorate's disbandment proves fertile ground for bureaucratic expansion; citizens cheer as resolution minutes pile higher than chimneys.
